title: cleistogenes serotina
intro: Cleistogenes serotina, also known as the serotine grass, is a type of plant in the grass family native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cleistogenes serotina include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cleistogenes serotina can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
